final:
module power_gating (
    input wire PC, // Power control signal
    input wire D,  // Data input
    output wire Y  // Output
);
assign Y = PC ? D : 1'b0; // If PC is high, output D, otherwise output 0
endmodule

module mux_2to1(
    input [1:0] a,  // First input
    input [1:0] b,  // Second input
    input sel,      // Select signal
    output [1:0] y  // Output
);
    assign y = sel ? b : a;  // Selects input based on sel
endmodule

module mux_2to1 (
    input wire a,     // Input 0
    input wire b,     // Input 1
    input wire sel,   // Select signal
    output wire y     // Output
);
    assign y = sel ? b : a; // If sel is 1, output b; else output a
endmodule

module mux2to1 (
    input [3:0] a,      // First input
    input [3:0] b,      // Second input
    input sel,          // Select signal
    output [3:0] out    // Output
);
    assign out = sel ? b : a; // If sel is 1, output b, else output a
endmodule

module power_gating(
    input wire control,
    input wire in,
    output wire out
);
    assign out = control ? in : 1'b0; // Power gating logic
endmodule

module clock_gating(
    input clk,        // Clock input
    input enable,     // Enable signal
    output gated_clk  // Gated clock output
);
    assign gated_clk = enable ? clk : 1'b0; // If enable is high, output clk, else output 0
endmodule

module top_module(
    input A,

    output Y
);assign Y = EN ? A : B;

endmodule

module top_module(input [31:0] ina,input [31:0] inb,

module top_module(input SEL, input TRIGGERED, input [15:0] RAM_DATA, output [15:0] DATA);assign DATA=SEL?RAM_DATA:TRIGGERED;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input in0,
    input in1,
    input sel,
    output out
);assign out = sel ? in1 : in0;

endmodule

module mux_2to1_8bit(
    input sel,             // Select signal.
    input [7:0] in0,       // 8-bit input 0.
    input [7:0] in1,       // 8-bit input 1.
    output [7:0] out       // 8-bit output.
);

assign out = sel ? in1 : in0;  // Select between in0 and in1 based on sel.

endmodule

module top_module(
	input [1:0]in,
	input [0:0]config_in,

	output out
);assign out = config_in[0]? in[1] : in[0];endmodule

module mux4to1 (
    input d0,
    input d1,
    input d2,
    input d3,
    input s0,
    input s1,
    output y
);

    assign y = (s1 ? (s0 ? d3 : d2) : (s0 ? d1 : d0));

endmodule

module top_module(input BAout, input [31:0] Zeros, R0_in, output [31:0] R0Mux_out);assign R0Mux_out = BAout ? Zeros: R0_in;

endmodule

module top_module(
  input clk,
  input rst,
  input [n-1:0] in,
  output reg [n-1:0] out
);parameter n = 8; // number of bits in the input and output signals

reg [n-1:0] sum; // register to store the accumulated sum

always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (rst) begin
    sum <= 0; // reset the accumulated sum to zero
  end else begin
    sum <= sum + in; // add the input signal to the accumulated sum
  end
end

assign out = rst ? 0 : sum; // select between the accumulated sum and zero based on the reset signal

endmodule

module top_module(  output Out, input D0, D1, D2, D3, s0, s1 );assign Out = s1? (s0 ? D3: D1) : (s0? D1:D0);

endmodule

module top_module(
    input [3:0] in0,
    input [3:0] in1,
    input [3:0] in2,
    input [3:0] in3,
    input sel0,
    input sel1,
    output [3:0] out
    );assign out = sel1 & sel0 ? in3 : sel1 & ~sel0 ? in2 : ~sel1 & sel0 ? in1 : in0;
    
endmodule
module top_module( input S, A0, A1, output Q);assign Q = S ? A1 : A0;endmodule

module top_module(input D0, D1, SD, output Z);assign Z = SD ? D1 : D0; 
 endmodule

module top_module(
    input A, B, C, D, SEL0, SEL1,
    output Y);assign Y = SEL0 & SEL1 ? D : SEL0 ? C : SEL1 ? B : A;
    
endmodule

    );assign out = select ? in1 : in0;

endmodule

module mux_2to1_en(
    input [3:0] a,    // Input signal a with a data width of 4 bits.
    input [3:0] b,    // Input signal b with a data width of 4 bits.
    input sel,        // Selection signal.
    input en,         // Enable signal.
    output [3:0] y    // Output signal with a data width of 4 bits.
);

assign y = en ? (sel ? b : a) : 4'b0000;  // Multiplexer operation.

endmodule

	input clk,

module top_module(
  input clk,
  input wr_en,
  input rd_en,
  input [11:0] addr,
  input [15:0] data_in,
  output [15:0] data_out
);reg [15:0] mem [0:4095];

  always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (wr_en) begin
      mem[addr] <= data_in;
    end
  end

  assign data_out = rd_en ? mem[addr] : 16'h0000;

endmodule

module mux_2to1_8bit(

module top_module(
    input A1,
    input A2,
    input A3,
    input A4,
    input B1,
    output Y
);wire b_and = A1 & A2 & A3 & A4; // logical AND of all inputs
    wire b_or = A1 | A2 | A3 | A4; // logical OR of all inputs

    assign Y = B1 ? b_and : b_or; // if B1 is high, output b_and. Otherwise, output b_or.

endmodule

module mux2to1 (
	input sel,
	input d0,
	input d1,
	output y
);assign y = sel ? d1 : d0;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input [3:0] a,
    input [3:0] b,
    input sub,
    output [3:0] sum
);wire [3:0] neg_b;
    assign neg_b = ~b + 1; // Two's complement negation of b

    assign sum = sub ? a + neg_b : a + b; // Ternary operator to choose between addition and subtraction

endmodule

module top_module(
	input [63:0] pc_sinsalto,

	);assign nextpc = pcsrc ? pc_consalto : pc_sinsalto;

module top_module(

module top_module (
    input wire d0,
    input wire d1,
    input wire d2,
    input wire d3,
    input wire s0,
    input wire s1,
    output wire y
);

    assign y = s1 ? (s0 ? d3 : d2) : (s0 ? d1 : d0);

endmodule

module top_module(
  input [n-1:0] in,
  input en,
  output [n-1:0] out
);parameter n = 8; // number of input and output signals

reg [n-1:0] latch; // latch to hold previous input values

always @(posedge en) begin
  if (en) begin
    latch <= in; // store input values in latch when enable signal is high
  end
end

assign out = en ? in : latch; // connect inputs to outputs when enable signal is high, otherwise hold previous values

endmodule

module top_module(
  input [3:0] A,
  input [3:0] B,
  input S,
  output [3:0] C
);assign C = S ? A - B : A + B;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input  wire in0,
    input  wire in1,
    input  wire in2,
    input  wire in3,
    input  wire sel0,
    input  wire sel1,
    output wire out
);assign out = sel1 & sel0 ? in3 :
                 sel1 & !sel0 ? in2 :
                 !sel1 & sel0 ? in1 :
                 !sel1 & !sel0 ? in0 :
                 1'bx;

endmodule

module mux_2to1 (
    input a,

assign y = sel ? b : a;

module top_module(input in1, in2, select, output out);assign out = select ? in2 : in1;

module top_module(
	input  D0, D1, D2, D3,
	input  D4, D5, D6, D7,
	input  S0, S1, S2,
	output Y
);assign Y = S2 ? (S1 ? (S0 ? D7 : D6) :
						  (S0 ? D5 : D4)) :
					(S1 ? (S0 ? D3 : D2) :
						  (S0 ? D1 : D0));

endmodule

module top_module(
  input [(1 - 1):0] ip,
  output [(1 - 1):0] op,
  input clk,
  input ce,
  input clr);reg [(1 - 1):0] op_reg;

  always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (ce) begin
      op_reg <= ~ip;
    end
  end

  assign op = clr ? 1'b0 : op_reg;

endmodule

	input wire a,
	input wire b,

 endmodule

    input sel,             // Select signal for the multiplexer.

    input [3:0] in1,       // Second 4-bit input signal.

);

assign out = sel ? in1 : in0;    // Output based on select signal.

module top_module(input [15:0] in, input sig, output [15:0] out);assign out = sig == 1 ? ~in + 1 : in;endmodule

module top_module(input wire data_in_0,
   input wire data_in_1,
   input wire select,
   output wire data_out);assign data_out = select ? data_in_1 : data_in_0;

endmodule

module top_module(A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H, I, J, K, L, M, N, O, P, S, T, U, V, Y);input A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H, I, J, K, L, M, N, O, P, S, T, U, V; 
 output Y; 
 assign Y = V ? U ? T ? (S ? P : O) : 
  (S ? N : M) : 
  T ? (S ? L : K) : 
  (S ? J : I) : 
  U ? T ? (S ? H : G) : 
  (S ? F : E) : 
  T ? (S ? D : C) : 
  (S ? B : A); 
 endmodule

    input [31:0] data1,

    );assign out = select == 0 ? data1:data2;
endmodule

module top_module(
  (* intersynth_conntype = "Byte" *)

  (* intersynth_conntype = "Byte" *)
  input[7:0] B_i,
  (* intersynth_conntype = "Bit" *)
  input S_i,

);assign     Y_o = S_i ? B_i : A_i;

module top_module(

        (* X_INTERFACE_PARAMETER = "POLARITY ACTIVE_HIGH" *)
        input M_SEL,

        input M_IN_0,

        input M_IN_1,

        output M_OUT
    );assign M_OUT = M_SEL ? M_IN_1 : M_IN_0;
endmodule

module top_module(
    input  D   ,
    output reg Q   ,  // Changed to reg for sequential logic
    output Q_N ,
    input  SCD ,
    input  SCE ,
    input  CLK ,
    input  VPB ,
    input  VPWR,
    input  VGND,
    input  VNB
);wire D_ff;

assign D_ff = SCE ? SCD : D;

always @(posedge CLK) begin
    Q <= D_ff;  // 'Q' must be assigned as it is now a reg type
end

assign Q_N = ~Q;  // Directly use Q for Q_N

endmodule

module mux_2to1(
    input a,
    input b,

    output y
);

    assign y = sel ? b : a; // Select between a and b based on sel

endmodule

module top_module(input [31:0] IN1,IN2,input IR_CU,output [31:0] OUT);assign OUT = IR_CU ? IN2 : IN1 ;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input [15:0] data_in,

);assign data_out = enable ? (data_in & mask) : data_in;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input [7:0] input1,
    input [7:0] input2,
    input select,
    output [7:0] selected_out
    );assign selected_out = select ? input2 : input1;
    
endmodule

module top_module(
    input [31:0] IR_D,
    input [1:0] A3_SEL,
    output [4:0] A3,
    input [31:0] RF_RT,
    input [31:0] imm_ext,
    input ALUB_SEL,
    output [31:0] ALUB,
    input [31:0] RDATA,
    input [31:0] RES_ALU_W,
    input [31:0] PC8_W,
    input [1:0] WD3_SEL,
    output [31:0] WD3,
    input [31:0] RES_ALU_E,
    input [31:0] HL_E,
    input AO_SEL_E,
    output [31:0] AO_E
    );wire[4:0] rt, rd;
    assign {rt, rd} = IR_D[20:11];
    
    assign A3 = (A3_SEL == 2'b00)? rt:
                (A3_SEL == 2'b01)? rd:
                (A3_SEL == 2'b10)? 5'h1f:
                                   rt;

    assign ALUB = (ALUB_SEL == 1'b1)? imm_ext : RF_RT;                                   

    assign WD3 = (WD3_SEL == 2'b00)? RES_ALU_W:
                 (WD3_SEL == 2'b01)? RDATA:
                 (WD3_SEL == 2'b10)? PC8_W:
                                     RES_ALU_W;   

    assign AO_E = AO_SEL_E? HL_E : RES_ALU_E;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input [7:0] a,
    input [7:0] b,
    input add_sub,
    output [7:0] result
);

    assign result = add_sub ? (a + b) : (a - b);  // Add or subtract based on add_sub

endmodule

);assign out = sel ? B : A;

endmodule

 endmodule

		input s,
		input [31:0] I0,

    );assign o = s ? I1 : I0;

                input data_in_0,

                );assign data_out = select ? data_in_1 : data_in_0;
endmodule

module top_module(
    input wire MEMtoReg,
    input wire[31:0] load_data,
    input wire[31:0] ALU_result,
    output wire[31:0] write_data
);assign write_data = MEMtoReg ? load_data : ALU_result;
endmodule

module top_module(input I, output O);// Declare output enable signal
    wire oe = 1'b1; // Set output enable to 1

    // Replace the unknown module with a simple buffer implementation
    assign O = oe ? I : 1'bz; // Output I when oe is high, otherwise high-impedance (tri-state)
endmodule

module mux_2to1(
    input [7:0] a,    // Input signal a with a data width of 8 bits.
    input [7:0] b,    // Input signal b with a data width of 8 bits.
    input sel,        // Selection signal.
    output [7:0] y    // Output signal with a data width of 8 bits.
);

assign y = sel ? b : a;  // Multiplexer operation.

endmodule

module top_module(
	input clk,
	input ALUSrcA,
	input [31:0]in0,
	input [31:0]in1,
	output wire[31:0]out
);assign out = ALUSrcA? in1 : in0;endmodule

module top_module(
    input  A1  ,
    input  A2  ,
    input  A3  ,
    input  A4  ,
    input  B1  ,
    output Y   ,
    input  VPB ,
    input  VPWR,
    input  VGND,
    input  VNB
);wire and_result;

assign and_result = A1 & A2 & A3 & A4;

assign Y = B1 ? 1 : and_result;

endmodule

module top_module(
	input 	a , 
	input 	b , 
	input 	c , 
	output 	y
);assign y = a?(b?(a & c ):c):(!c);
endmodule

module top_module(input select, input [4:0]in1,in2, output [4:0]MuxOut);assign MuxOut = select ? in1 : in2;
endmodule

module top_module(
  input a,
  input b,
  input op,
  output out
);assign out = op ? ~a : (a ^ b);

endmodule

module top_module(
	input clk,
	input MemtoReg,
	input [31:0] in0,
	input [31:0] in1,
	output wire[31:0] out
);assign out = MemtoReg ? in1 : in0;endmodule

module top_module(
  input A1,
  input A2,
  input B1,
  input B2,
  output X,
  input VPB,
  input VPWR,
  input VGND,
  input VNB
);wire sel;
  assign sel = A1 | A2;

  assign X = sel ? (A1 ? B1 : B2) : 1'b0;

endmodule

module multiplexer_8bit (
    input [7:0] a,
    input [7:0] b,
    input sel,
    output [7:0] y);
    
    assign y = sel ? b : a;
    
endmodule
module top_module( output o, input [1:0] in ,input s);assign o = s ? in[1]:in[0];endmodule

module top_module(
    input CS, 
    
    
    input A0,
    input A1,
    output [3:0] enable 
);assign enable = CS == 1'b1 ? 4'b0000 :
                {A1, A0} == 2'b00 ? 4'b0001 : 
                {A1, A0} == 2'b01 ? 4'b0010 : 
                {A1, A0} == 2'b10 ? 4'b0100 :
                {A1, A0} == 2'B11 ? 4'b1000 : 4'b0000;

endmodule

module top_module(input D0, D1, D2, D3, S0, S1,output Y);assign Y = S1 ? (S0 ? D3 : D2) : (S0 ? D1 : D0); 
 endmodule

module top_module(
    input [31:0] data,
    input [4:0] shift_amount,
    input shift_direction,
    output [31:0] shifted_data
);assign shifted_data = shift_direction ? data << shift_amount : data >> shift_amount;

endmodule

module mux_4to1 (
    input wire A,
    input wire B,
    input wire C,
    input wire D,
    input wire Sel0,
    input wire Sel1,
    output wire Y
    );

assign Y = (Sel1 ? (Sel0 ? D : C) : (Sel0 ? B : A));

endmodule

module top_module(
  input [15:0] A,
  input [15:0] B,
  input C,
  output [15:0] Y
);assign Y = C ? ~(A & B) : (A & B);

endmodule

module top_module(
    input in_0,
    input in_1,
    input select,
    output out
);assign out = select ? in_1 : in_0;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input En,
    input [31:0] In1,
    input [31:0] In2,
    output [31:0] Out
);assign Out = En? In1: In2;

endmodule

module top_module( 
	output [3:0] out , 
	input sel, 
	input [3:0] Data1, 
	input [3:0] Data2 ) ;assign out = sel ? Data2 : Data1 ;endmodule

module top_module(input [7:0] in1, input [7:0] in2, input sel, output [7:0] out);assign out = sel ? in1 : in2;
endmodule

module multiplexer (
        input [7:0] a,
        input [7:0] b,
        input sel,
        output [7:0] y);

    assign y = sel ? b : a;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input a,
    input b,
    input sel,
    output y
);

    assign y = sel ? b : a;  // Multiplexer logic

endmodule

module top_module(
  input [n-1:0] bus_in,
  input clk,
  input reset,
  output [n-1:0] bus_out
);parameter n = 8; // number of bits in the bus signal

reg [n-1:0] bus_hold_reg; // register to hold the bus signal

always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (reset) begin
    bus_hold_reg <= 0;
  end else begin
    bus_hold_reg <= bus_in;
  end
end

assign bus_out = reset ? 0 : bus_hold_reg;

endmodule

module top_module(
  input [3:0] A,
  input [3:0] B,
  input RST,
  output [3:0] C
);assign C = RST ? 4'b0000 : A + B;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input [7:0] a,
    input [7:0] b,
    input ctrl,
    output [7:0] out
);assign out = ctrl ? ~(a ^ b) : (a ^ b);

endmodule

module top_module(
	 input  RegDst,           
	 input  [4:0] Rt,         
	 input  [4:0] Rd,         
	 output  [4:0] RegAddr    
    );assign RegAddr = RegDst ? Rd : Rt;endmodule

module top_module (
	input [15:0] a,
	input [15:0] b,
	input sel,
	output [15:0] out);

assign out = sel ? b : a;

endmodule

module mux_2to1(
	input wire d0,
	input wire d1,
	input wire sel,
	output wire y
);assign y = sel ? d1 : d0;
endmodule

module top_module(
	 input  RegRA,               
	 input  [4:0] RegAddr,       
	 output  [4:0] raRegAddr    
	 );assign raRegAddr = RegRA ? 5'b11111 : RegAddr;endmodule

module five_to_one (
    input A1,
    input A2,
    input A3,
    input A4,
    input B1,
    output Y
);

    wire b_and = A1 & A2 & A3 & A4; // logical AND of all inputs
    wire b_or = A1 | A2 | A3 | A4; // logical OR of all inputs

    assign Y = B1 ? b_and : b_or; // if B1 is high, output b_and. Otherwise, output b_or.

endmodule
